name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Inefficient reconciliation of vendor payments and expenses.
